props.headline: Achieve Your Nursing Career Dreams in Australia
props.subhead: As a Filipino registered nurse like Maria Santos, CELPIP can help you meet English requirements for AHPRA and boost your confidence in communication.
props.imageAlt: A Filipino nurse studying for the CELPIP test.

props.heading: Key Features of CELPIP for Nurses

features.title: AHPRA Acceptance
features.desc: CELPIP is accepted by AHPRA for nursing registration. Maria Santos trusts CELPIP for her journey to Australia.

features.title: Fast Results
features.desc: Receive fast, accurate results that support your migration journey. With CELPIP, you can plan your next steps confidently.

features.title: Real-life Skills
features.desc: CELPIP tests everyday communication skills relevant to nursing. Show your proficiency in a way that matters.

props.imageAlt: Maria Santos celebrating her CELPIP test success in Sydney
props.oneLineMoment: Maria Santos proudly holds her CELPIP results in Sydney, ready for the next step.
props.paragraphQuote: I felt nervous before my CELPIP test, but I knew it was the key to my nursing career in Australia. The test was straightforward and focused on everyday communication, which is so important for nurses. When I got my results, I felt a wave of relief. CELPIP helped me demonstrate my English skills clearly, and now I can move forward with my dreams. I’m grateful for the support it offered during my journey.

testimonial.name: Maria Santos
testimonial.quote: Taking the CELPIP test was a great experience for me. It was straightforward and focused on real-life communication, which is essential for my nursing career. I felt prepared, and the results came quickly. AHPRA accepts CELPIP, which gave me confidence in my journey. I truly believe I've got this, and CELPIP has supported me every step of the way.

props.heading: Frequently Asked Questions for Filipino Nurses

faqs.q: What English tests are accepted by AHPRA for nursing registration?
faqs.a: AHPRA accepts CELPIP as a valid English test for nursing registration. This means you can confidently use CELPIP to demonstrate your English proficiency as you pursue your career in Australia.

faqs.q: How quickly will I receive my CELPIP results?
faqs.a: CELPIP provides fast, accurate results to support your migration journey. You can expect to receive your scores in a timely manner, allowing you to move forward with your plans.

faqs.q: What skills does the CELPIP test assess?
faqs.a: The CELPIP test assesses everyday communication skills that are relevant to nursing. This includes listening, reading, writing, and speaking, ensuring you are well-prepared for your role.

faqs.q: Where can I take the CELPIP test?
faqs.a: CELPIP test centres are conveniently located across Canada and you also have the option to take the test online, making it accessible for you as you prepare for your journey.

props.heading: Stay Informed, Maria Santos!
props.subheading: Sign up for updates on CELPIP and your journey to nursing in Australia.
